description_long: This is a high-top, fashion-forward shoe featuring a chunky, multi-layered sole with a bold color palette of black, white, red, yellow, and maroon. The upper is predominantly dark, with a smooth, synthetic finish, and is accented by a large, sculpted yellow overlay that wraps around the midfoot and heel, providing both structure and visual interest. The shoe has a unique lacing system with black laces running through eyelets on the yellow overlay, and a pull tab at the back for easy wear. The heel area is reinforced with a ribbed maroon section, and the sole is thick and segmented, with red accents on the tread for added grip and style. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, likely intended for urban environments where both comfort and statement aesthetics are valued. There are no visible logos or brand markings, and the shoe appears to be in pristine, new condition.
description: A modern, high-top shoe with a chunky, multi-colored sole and a sculpted yellow overlay, featuring a unique lacing system and bold urban styling. The shoe is new and visually striking, with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the maroon ribbed heel support, black upper, and the red heel section of the sole.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the yellow overlay, black upper, and thick white and red sole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the lacing system, yellow overlay with black eyelets, and the rounded toe.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the yellow overlay and visible pull tab at the back.
